19: {

21:     uint32_t asset_size;   /*!< Size of the asset */
22:     uint32_t asset_offset; /*!< Offset of the asset */
23:     uint16_t asset_width;  /*!< Width of the asset */
24:     uint16_t asset_height; /*!< Height of the asset */

39: uint32_t Assets::CalculateChecksum(const char *data, uint32_t length)
40: {
41:     uint32_t checksum = 0;
42:     for (uint32_t i = 0; i < length; i++)
43:     {
44:         checksum += data[i];
45:     }
46:     return checksum & 0xFFFF;
47: }

49: bool Assets::InitializePartition()
50: {
51:     partition_valid_ = false;
52:     checksum_valid_ = false;
53:     assets_.clear();
54: 
55:     partition_ = esp_partition_find_first(ESP_PARTITION_TYPE_ANY, ESP_PARTITION_SUBTYPE_ANY, "assets");
56:     if (partition_ == nullptr)
57:     {
58:         ESP_LOGI(TAG, "No assets partition found");
59:         return false;
60:     }
61: 
62:     int free_pages = spi_flash_mmap_get_free_pages(SPI_FLASH_MMAP_DATA);
63:     uint32_t storage_size = free_pages * 64 * 1024;
64:     ESP_LOGI(TAG, "The storage free size is %ld KB", storage_size / 1024);
65:     ESP_LOGI(TAG, "The partition size is %ld KB", partition_->size / 1024);
66:     if (storage_size < partition_->size)
67:     {
68:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "The free size %ld KB is less than assets partition required %ld KB", storage_size / 1024, partition_->size / 1024);
69:         return false;
70:     }
71: 
72:     esp_err_t err = esp_partition_mmap(partition_, 0, partition_->size, ESP_PARTITION_MMAP_DATA, (const void **)&mmap_root_, &mmap_handle_);
73:     if (err != ESP_OK)
74:     {
75:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to mmap assets partition: %s", esp_err_to_name(err));
76:         return false;
77:     }
78: 
79:     partition_valid_ = true;
80: 
81:     uint32_t stored_files = *(uint32_t *)(mmap_root_ + 0);
82:     uint32_t stored_chksum = *(uint32_t *)(mmap_root_ + 4);
83:     uint32_t stored_len = *(uint32_t *)(mmap_root_ + 8);
84: 
85:     if (stored_len > partition_->size - 12)
86:     {
87:         ESP_LOGD(TAG, "The stored_len (0x%lx) is greater than the partition size (0x%lx) - 12", stored_len, partition_->size);
88:         return false;
89:     }
90: 
91:     auto start_time = esp_timer_get_time();
92:     uint32_t calculated_checksum = CalculateChecksum(mmap_root_ + 12, stored_len);
93:     auto end_time = esp_timer_get_time();
94:     ESP_LOGI(TAG, "The checksum calculation time is %d ms", int((end_time - start_time) / 1000));
95: 
96:     if (calculated_checksum != stored_chksum)
97:     {
98:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "The calculated checksum (0x%lx) does not match the stored checksum (0x%lx)", calculated_checksum, stored_chksum);
99:         return false;
100:     }
101: 
102:     checksum_valid_ = true;
103: 
104:     for (uint32_t i = 0; i < stored_files; i++)
105:     {
106:         auto item = (const mmap_assets_table *)(mmap_root_ + 12 + i * sizeof(mmap_assets_table));
107:         auto asset = Asset{
108:             .size = static_cast<size_t>(item->asset_size),
109:             .offset = static_cast<size_t>(12 + sizeof(mmap_assets_table) * stored_files + item->asset_offset)};
110:         assets_[item->asset_name] = asset;
111:     }
112:     return checksum_valid_;
113: }

463: bool Assets::Download(std::string url, std::function<void(int progress, size_t speed)> progress_callback)
464: {
465:     ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Downloading new version of assets from %s", url.c_str());
466: 
467:     // 取消当前资源分区的内存映射
468:     if (mmap_handle_ != 0)
469:     {
470:         esp_partition_munmap(mmap_handle_);
471:         mmap_handle_ = 0;
472:         mmap_root_ = nullptr;
473:     }
474:     checksum_valid_ = false;
475:     assets_.clear();
476: 
477:     // 下载新的资源文件
478:     auto network = Board::GetInstance().GetNetwork();
479:     auto http = network->CreateHttp(0);
480: 
481:     if (!http->Open("GET", url))
482:     {
483:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to open HTTP connection");
484:         return false;
485:     }
486: 
487:     if (http->GetStatusCode() != 200)
488:     {
489:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to get assets, status code: %d", http->GetStatusCode());
490:         return false;
491:     }
492: 
493:     size_t content_length = http->GetBodyLength();
494:     if (content_length == 0)
495:     {
496:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to get content length");
497:         return false;
498:     }
499: 
500:     if (content_length > partition_->size)
501:     {
502:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Assets file size (%u) is larger than partition size (%lu)", content_length, partition_->size);
503:         return false;
504:     }
505: 
506:     // 定义扇区大小为4KB（ESP32的标准扇区大小）
507:     const size_t SECTOR_SIZE = esp_partition_get_main_flash_sector_size();
508: 
509:     // 计算需要擦除的扇区数量
510:     size_t sectors_to_erase = (content_length + SECTOR_SIZE - 1) / SECTOR_SIZE; // 向上取整
511:     size_t total_erase_size = sectors_to_erase * SECTOR_SIZE;
512: 
513:     ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Sector size: %u, content length: %u, sectors to erase: %u, total erase size: %u",
514:              SECTOR_SIZE, content_length, sectors_to_erase, total_erase_size);
515: 
516:     // 写入新的资源文件到分区，一边erase一边写入
517:     char buffer[512];
518:     size_t total_written = 0;
519:     size_t recent_written = 0;
520:     size_t current_sector = 0;
521:     auto last_calc_time = esp_timer_get_time();
522: 
523:     while (true)
524:     {
525:         int ret = http->Read(buffer, sizeof(buffer));
526:         if (ret < 0)
527:         {
528:             ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to read HTTP data: %s", esp_err_to_name(ret));
529:             return false;
530:         }
531: 
532:         if (ret == 0)
533:         {
534:             break;
535:         }
536: 
537:         // 检查是否需要擦除新的扇区
538:         size_t write_end_offset = total_written + ret;
539:         size_t needed_sectors = (write_end_offset + SECTOR_SIZE - 1) / SECTOR_SIZE;
540: 
541:         // 擦除需要的新扇区
542:         while (current_sector < needed_sectors)
543:         {
544:             size_t sector_start = current_sector * SECTOR_SIZE;
545:             size_t sector_end = (current_sector + 1) * SECTOR_SIZE;
546: 
547:             // 确保擦除范围不超过分区大小
548:             if (sector_end > partition_->size)
549:             {
550:                 ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Sector end (%u) exceeds partition size (%lu)", sector_end, partition_->size);
551:                 return false;
552:             }
553: 
554:             ESP_LOGD(TAG, "Erasing sector %u (offset: %u, size: %u)", current_sector, sector_start, SECTOR_SIZE);
555:             esp_err_t err = esp_partition_erase_range(partition_, sector_start, SECTOR_SIZE);
556:             if (err != ESP_OK)
557:             {
558:                 ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to erase sector %u at offset %u: %s", current_sector, sector_start, esp_err_to_name(err));
559:                 return false;
560:             }
561: 
562:             current_sector++;
563:         }
564: 
565:         // 写入数据到分区
566:         esp_err_t err = esp_partition_write(partition_, total_written, buffer, ret);
567:         if (err != ESP_OK)
568:         {
569:             ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to write to assets partition at offset %u: %s", total_written, esp_err_to_name(err));
570:             return false;
571:         }
572: 
573:         total_written += ret;
574:         recent_written += ret;
575: 
576:         // 计算进度和速度
577:         if (esp_timer_get_time() - last_calc_time >= 1000000 || total_written == content_length || ret == 0)
578:         {
579:             size_t progress = total_written * 100 / content_length;
580:             size_t speed = recent_written; // 每秒的字节数
581:             ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Progress: %u%% (%u/%u), Speed: %u B/s, Sectors erased: %u",
582:                      progress, total_written, content_length, speed, current_sector);
583:             if (progress_callback)

597:         return false;

601:              total_written, current_sector);

613: bool Assets::GetAssetData(const std::string &name, void *&ptr, size_t &size)
614: {
615:     auto asset = assets_.find(name);
616:     if (asset == assets_.end())
617:     {
618:         return false;
619:     }
620:     auto data = (const char *)(mmap_root_ + asset->second.offset);
621:     if (data[0] != 'Z' || data[1] != 'Z')
622:     {
623:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "The asset %s is not valid with magic %02x%02x", name.c_str(), data[0], data[1]);
624:         return false;
625:     }
626: 
627:     ptr = static_cast<void *>(const_cast<char *>(data + 2));
628:     size = asset->second.size;
629:     return true;
630: }

461: bool Assets::Download(std::string url, std::function<void(int progress, size_t speed)> progress_callback)
462: {
463:     ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Downloading new version of assets from %s", url.c_str());
464: 
465:     // 取消当前资源分区的内存映射
466:     if (mmap_handle_ != 0)
467:     {
468:         esp_partition_munmap(mmap_handle_);
469:         mmap_handle_ = 0;
470:         mmap_root_ = nullptr;
471:     }
472:     checksum_valid_ = false;
473:     assets_.clear();

475:     // 下载新的资源文件
476:     auto network = Board::GetInstance().GetNetwork();
477:     auto http = network->CreateHttp(0);
478: 
479:     if (!http->Open("GET", url))
480:     {
481:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to open HTTP connection");
482:         return false;
483:     }
484: 
485:     if (http->GetStatusCode() != 200)
486:     {
487:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to get assets, status code: %d", http->GetStatusCode());
488:         return false;
489:     }

491:     size_t content_length = http->GetBodyLength();
492:     if (content_length == 0)
493:     {
494:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to get content length");
495:         return false;
496:     }
497: 
498:     if (content_length > partition_->size)
499:     {
500:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Assets file size (%u) is larger than partition size (%lu)", content_length, partition_->size);
501:         return false;
502:     }

504:     // 定义扇区大小为4KB（ESP32的标准扇区大小）
505:     const size_t SECTOR_SIZE = esp_partition_get_main_flash_sector_size();
506: 
507:     // 计算需要擦除的扇区数量
508:     size_t sectors_to_erase = (content_length + SECTOR_SIZE - 1) / SECTOR_SIZE; // 向上取整
509:     size_t total_erase_size = sectors_to_erase * SECTOR_SIZE;
510: 
511:     ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Sector size: %u, content length: %u, sectors to erase: %u, total erase size: %u",
512:              SECTOR_SIZE, content_length, sectors_to_erase, total_erase_size);
513: 
514:     // 写入新的资源文件到分区，一边erase一边写入

518:     size_t current_sector = 0;
519:     auto last_calc_time = esp_timer_get_time();
520: 
521:     while (true)
522:     {
523:         int ret = http->Read(buffer, sizeof(buffer));
524:         if (ret < 0)
525:         {
526:             ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to read HTTP data: %s", esp_err_to_name(ret));
527:             return false;
528:         }
529: 
530:         if (ret == 0)
531:         {
532:             break;
533:         }
534: 
535:         // 检查是否需要擦除新的扇区
536:         size_t write_end_offset = total_written + ret;
537:         size_t needed_sectors = (write_end_offset + SECTOR_SIZE - 1) / SECTOR_SIZE;
538: 
539:         // 擦除需要的新扇区
540:         while (current_sector < needed_sectors)
541:         {
542:             size_t sector_start = current_sector * SECTOR_SIZE;
543:             size_t sector_end = (current_sector + 1) * SECTOR_SIZE;
544: 
545:             // 确保擦除范围不超过分区大小
546:             if (sector_end > partition_->size)
547:             {
548:                 ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Sector end (%u) exceeds partition size (%lu)", sector_end, partition_->size);
549:                 return false;
550:             }
551: 
552:             ESP_LOGD(TAG, "Erasing sector %u (offset: %u, size: %u)", current_sector, sector_start, SECTOR_SIZE);
553:             esp_err_t err = esp_partition_erase_range(partition_, sector_start, SECTOR_SIZE);
554:             if (err != ESP_OK)
555:             {
556:                 ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to erase sector %u at offset %u: %s", current_sector, sector_start, esp_err_to_name(err));
557:                 return false;
558:             }
559: 
560:             current_sector++;
561:         }
562: 
563:         // 写入数据到分区
564:         esp_err_t err = esp_partition_write(partition_, total_written, buffer, ret);
565:         if (err != ESP_OK)
566:         {
567:             ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to write to assets partition at offset %u: %s", total_written, esp_err_to_name(err));
568:             return false;
569:         }
570: 
571:         total_written += ret;
572:         recent_written += ret;
573: 
574:         // 计算进度和速度
575:         if (esp_timer_get_time() - last_calc_time >= 1000000 || total_written == content_length || ret == 0)
576:         {
577:             size_t progress = total_written * 100 / content_length;
578:             size_t speed = recent_written; // 每秒的字节数
579:             ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Progress: %u%% (%u/%u), Speed: %u B/s, Sectors erased: %u",
580:                      progress, total_written, content_length, speed, current_sector);
581:             if (progress_callback)
582:             {
583:                 progress_callback(progress, speed);
584:             }
585:             last_calc_time = esp_timer_get_time();
586:             recent_written = 0; // 重置最近写入的字节数
587:         }
588:     }
589: 
590:     http->Close();
591: 
592:     if (total_written != content_length)
593:     {
594:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Downloaded size (%u) does not match expected size (%u)", total_written, content_length);
595:         return false;
596:     }
597: 
598:     ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Assets download completed, total written: %u bytes, total sectors erased: %u",
599:              total_written, current_sector);
600: 
601:     // 重新初始化资源分区
602:     if (!InitializePartition())
603:     {
604:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to re-initialize assets partition");
605:         return false;
606:     }
607: 
608:     return true;
609: }

611: bool Assets::GetAssetData(const std::string &name, void *&ptr, size_t &size)
612: {
613:     auto asset = assets_.find(name);
614:     if (asset == assets_.end())
615:     {
616:         return false;
617:     }
618:     auto data = (const char *)(mmap_root_ + asset->second.offset);
619:     if (data[0] != 'Z' || data[1] != 'Z')
620:     {
621:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "The asset %s is not valid with magic %02x%02x", name.c_str(), data[0], data[1]);
622:         return false;
623:     }
624: 
625:     ptr = static_cast<void *>(const_cast<char *>(data + 2));
626:     size = asset->second.size;
627:     return true;
628: }

The generated code demonstrates good understanding of the destructor's purpose but has some issues:

Semantic Correctness (85/100): The core semantic meaning is correct - both handle the unmapping of memory when the object is destroyed. However, the generated code adds additional functionality (clearing assets_ map) that wasn't in the ground truth, which changes the semantic scope. The addition of setting mmap_handle_ = 0 and mmap_root_ = nullptr is good defensive programming but wasn't required in the original.

Structure Similarity (90/100): The structure is very similar with matching function signature, control flow, and API call. Both use the same conditional check and esp_partition_munmap() call. The formatting and indentation differ slightly but the overall structure matches well.

Functional Completeness (70/100): The generated code is incomplete relative to the ground truth because it does more than what's required. While it correctly implements the memory unmapping from the ground truth, it also includes additional operations (clearing assets_) that aren't part of the original specification. This makes it functionally different rather than equivalent, though the core functionality is preserved.

459: bool Assets::Download(std::string url, std::function<void(int progress, size_t speed)> progress_callback)
460: {
461:     ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Downloading new version of assets from %s", url.c_str());
462: 
463:     // 取消当前资源分区的内存映射
464:     if (mmap_handle_ != 0)
465:     {
466:         esp_partition_munmap(mmap_handle_);
467:         mmap_handle_ = 0;
468:         mmap_root_ = nullptr;
469:     }
470:     checksum_valid_ = false;
471:     assets_.clear();
472: 
473:     // 下载新的资源文件
474:     auto network = Board::GetInstance().GetNetwork();
475:     auto http = network->CreateHttp(0);
476: 
477:     if (!http->Open("GET", url))
478:     {
479:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to open HTTP connection");
480:         return false;
481:     }
482: 
483:     if (http->GetStatusCode() != 200)
484:     {
485:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to get assets, status code: %d", http->GetStatusCode());
486:         return false;
487:     }
488: 
489:     size_t content_length = http->GetBodyLength();
490:     if (content_length == 0)
491:     {
492:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to get content length");
493:         return false;
494:     }
495: 
496:     if (content_length > partition_->size)
497:     {
498:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Assets file size (%u) is larger than partition size (%lu)", content_length, partition_->size);
499:         return false;
500:     }
501: 
502:     // 定义扇区大小为4KB（ESP32的标准扇区大小）
503:     const size_t SECTOR_SIZE = esp_partition_get_main_flash_sector_size();
504: 
505:     // 计算需要擦除的扇区数量
506:     size_t sectors_to_erase = (content_length + SECTOR_SIZE - 1) / SECTOR_SIZE; // 向上取整
507:     size_t total_erase_size = sectors_to_erase * SECTOR_SIZE;
508: 
509:     ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Sector size: %u, content length: %u, sectors to erase: %u, total erase size: %u",
510:              SECTOR_SIZE, content_length, sectors_to_erase, total_erase_size);
511: 
512:     // 写入新的资源文件到分区，一边erase一边写入
513:     char buffer[512];
514:     size_t total_written = 0;
515:     size_t recent_written = 0;
516:     size_t current_sector = 0;
517:     auto last_calc_time = esp_timer_get_time();
518: 
519:     while (true)
520:     {
521:         int ret = http->Read(buffer, sizeof(buffer));
522:         if (ret < 0)
523:         {
524:             ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to read HTTP data: %s", esp_err_to_name(ret));
525:             return false;
526:         }
527: 
528:         if (ret == 0)
529:         {
530:             break;
531:         }
532: 
533:         // 检查是否需要擦除新的扇区
534:         size_t write_end_offset = total_written + ret;
535:         size_t needed_sectors = (write_end_offset + SECTOR_SIZE - 1) / SECTOR_SIZE;
536: 
537:         // 擦除需要的新扇区
538:         while (current_sector < needed_sectors)
539:         {
540:             size_t sector_start = current_sector * SECTOR_SIZE;
541:             size_t sector_end = (current_sector + 1) * SECTOR_SIZE;
542: 
543:             // 确保擦除范围不超过分区大小
544:             if (sector_end > partition_->size)
545:             {
546:                 ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Sector end (%u) exceeds partition size (%lu)", sector_end, partition_->size);
547:                 return false;
548:             }
549: 
550:             ESP_LOGD(TAG, "Erasing sector %u (offset: %u, size: %u)", current_sector, sector_start, SECTOR_SIZE);
551:             esp_err_t err = esp_partition_erase_range(partition_, sector_start, SECTOR_SIZE);
552:             if (err != ESP_OK)
553:             {
554:                 ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to erase sector %u at offset %u: %s", current_sector, sector_start, esp_err_to_name(err));
555:                 return false;
556:             }
557: 
558:             current_sector++;
559:         }
560: 
561:         // 写入数据到分区
562:         esp_err_t err = esp_partition_write(partition_, total_written, buffer, ret);
563:         if (err != ESP_OK)
564:         {
565:             ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to write to assets partition at offset %u: %s", total_written, esp_err_to_name(err));
566:             return false;
567:         }
568: 
569:         total_written += ret;
570:         recent_written += ret;
571: 
572:         // 计算进度和速度
573:         if (esp_timer_get_time() - last_calc_time >= 1000000 || total_written == content_length || ret == 0)
574:         {
575:             size_t progress = total_written * 100 / content_length;
576:             size_t speed = recent_written; // 每秒的字节数
577:             ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Progress: %u%% (%u/%u), Speed: %u B/s, Sectors erased: %u",
578:                      progress, total_written, content_length, speed, current_sector);
579:             if (progress_callback)
580:             {
581:                 progress_callback(progress, speed);
582:             }
583:             last_calc_time = esp_timer_get_time();
584:             recent_written = 0; // 重置最近写入的字节数
585:         }
586:     }
587: 
588:     http->Close();
589: 
590:     if (total_written != content_length)
591:     {
592:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Downloaded size (%u) does not match expected size (%u)", total_written, content_length);
593:         return false;
594:     }
595: 
596:     ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Assets download completed, total written: %u bytes, total sectors erased: %u",
597:              total_written, current_sector);
598: 
599:     // 重新初始化资源分区
600:     if (!InitializePartition())
601:     {
602:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to re-initialize assets partition");
603:         return false;
604:     }
605: 
606:     return true;
607: }
608: 
609: bool Assets::GetAssetData(const std::string &name, void *&ptr, size_t &size)
610: {
611:     auto asset = assets_.find(name);
612:     if (asset == assets_.end())
613:     {
614:         return false;
615:     }
616:     auto data = (const char *)(mmap_root_ + asset->second.offset);
617:     if (data[0] != 'Z' || data[1] != 'Z')
618:     {
619:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "The asset %s is not valid with magic %02x%02x", name.c_str(), data[0], data[1]);
620:         return false;
621:     }
622: 
623:     ptr = static_cast<void *>(const_cast<char *>(data + 2));
624:     size = asset->second.size;
625:     return true;
626: }
627: 
</file>

qualitative.analysis:
Semantic Correctness (75/100): The generated code performs the core checksum calculation by summing all bytes, which is semantically correct. However, it differs from the ground truth in the final step - the ground truth applies a mask (checksum & 0xFFFF) to limit the result to 16 bits, while the generated code returns the full 32-bit checksum. This is a significant semantic difference that affects the output range and expected behavior.

Structure Similarity (85/100): The code structure is very similar with the same function signature, parameter names, loop structure, and basic control flow. Both use a for-loop to iterate through the data, and both declare the same variable names. The only notable differences are minor stylistic choices like spacing and the use of static_cast<uint8_t>() in the generated code vs direct access in the ground truth.

Functional Completeness (60/100): The generated code misses the critical masking operation that limits the checksum to 16 bits as shown in the ground truth. While it implements the core byte-summing functionality, it fails to match the expected output format. Additionally, it doesn't include the explicit type casting to uint8_t that could improve robustness, though this is a minor issue compared to the masking omission.

469: bool Assets::GetAssetData(const std::string &name, void *&ptr, size_t &size)
470: {
471:     auto asset = assets_.find(name);
472:     if (asset == assets_.end())
473:     {
474:         return false;
475:     }
476:     auto data = (const char *)(mmap_root_ + asset->second.offset);
477:     if (data[0] != 'Z' || data[1] != 'Z')
478:     {
479:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "The asset %s is not valid with magic %02x%02x", name.c_str(), data[0], data[1]);
480:         return false;
481:     }
482: 
483:     ptr = static_cast<void *>(const_cast<char *>(data + 2));
484:     size = asset->second.size;
485:     return true;
486: }

qualitative.analysis:
The generated code attempts to implement a download function but has several significant issues that affect its correctness and completeness.

Semantic Correctness (65/100):
The core idea of downloading from a URL is correct, but there are major semantic differences. The ground truth uses ESP-IDF's partition management APIs (esp_partition_munmap, esp_partition_erase_range, esp_partition_write) which are specific to embedded systems with flash memory partitions. The generated code uses generic HTTP client APIs without any partition handling. Additionally, the progress calculation and speed measurement differ significantly in implementation details.

Structure Similarity (55/100):
While both functions have similar signatures and basic structure, they use completely different APIs and approaches. The ground truth uses Board::GetInstance().GetNetwork()->CreateHttp() and ESP-IDF partition APIs, while the generated code uses http_client_init() and standard C++ string operations. The control flow also differs greatly, with the ground truth having more sophisticated sector-based erasure logic and error handling.

Functional Completeness (40/100):
The generated code lacks critical functionality present in the ground truth:
- No partition management (mmap_handle_, mmap_root_, assets_ handling)
- No sector erasure logic for flash memory
- No validation against partition size limits
- No re-initialization of the partition after download
- Simplified progress reporting without the detailed logging
- Missing checksum validation
- No proper error handling for write operations to flash
The generated code only implements basic HTTP download functionality without the embedded system-specific requirements.

465: bool Assets::Download(std::string url, std::function<void(int progress, size_t speed)> progress_callback)
466: {
467:     ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Downloading new version of assets from %s", url.c_str());
468: 
469:     // 取消当前资源分区的内存映射
470:     if (mmap_handle_ != 0)
471:     {
472:         esp_partition_munmap(mmap_handle_);
473:         mmap_handle_ = 0;
474:         mmap_root_ = nullptr;
475:     }
476:     checksum_valid_ = false;
477:     assets_.clear();
478: 
479:     // 下载新的资源文件
480:     auto network = Board::GetInstance().GetNetwork();
481:     auto http = network->CreateHttp(0);
482: 
483:     if (!http->Open("GET", url))
484:     {
485:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to open HTTP connection");
486:         return false;
487:     }
488: 
489:     if (http->GetStatusCode() != 200)
490:     {
491:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to get assets, status code: %d", http->GetStatusCode());
492:         return false;
493:     }
494: 
495:     size_t content_length = http->GetBodyLength();
496:     if (content_length == 0)
497:     {
498:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to get content length");
499:         return false;
500:     }
501: 
502:     if (content_length > partition_->size)
503:     {
504:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Assets file size (%u) is larger than partition size (%lu)", content_length, partition_->size);
505:         return false;
506:     }
507: 
508:     // 定义扇区大小为4KB（ESP32的标准扇区大小）
509:     const size_t SECTOR_SIZE = esp_partition_get_main_flash_sector_size();
510: 
511:     // 计算需要擦除的扇区数量
512:     size_t sectors_to_erase = (content_length + SECTOR_SIZE - 1) / SECTOR_SIZE; // 向上取整
513:     size_t total_erase_size = sectors_to_erase * SECTOR_SIZE;
514: 
515:     ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Sector size: %u, content length: %u, sectors to erase: %u, total erase size: %u",
516:              SECTOR_SIZE, content_length, sectors_to_erase, total_erase_size);
517: 
518:     // 写入新的资源文件到分区，一边erase一边写入
519:     char buffer[512];
520:     size_t total_written = 0;
521:     size_t recent_written = 0;
522:     size_t current_sector = 0;
523:     auto last_calc_time = esp_timer_get_time();
524: 
525:     while (true)
526:     {
527:         int ret = http->Read(buffer, sizeof(buffer));
528:         if (ret < 0)
529:         {
530:             ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to read HTTP data: %s", esp_err_to_name(ret));
531:             return false;
532:         }
533: 
534:         if (ret == 0)
535:         {
536:             break;
537:         }
538: 
539:         // 检查是否需要擦除新的扇区
540:         size_t write_end_offset = total_written + ret;
541:         size_t needed_sectors = (write_end_offset + SECTOR_SIZE - 1) / SECTOR_SIZE;
542: 
543:         // 擦除需要的新扇区
544:         while (current_sector < needed_sectors)
545:         {
546:             size_t sector_start = current_sector * SECTOR_SIZE;
547:             size_t sector_end = (current_sector + 1) * SECTOR_SIZE;
548: 
549:             // 确保擦除范围不超过分区大小
550:             if (sector_end > partition_->size)
551:             {
552:                 ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Sector end (%u) exceeds partition size (%lu)", sector_end, partition_->size);
553:                 return false;
554:             }
555: 
556:             ESP_LOGD(TAG, "Erasing sector %u (offset: %u, size: %u)", current_sector, sector_start, SECTOR_SIZE);
557:             esp_err_t err = esp_partition_erase_range(partition_, sector_start, SECTOR_SIZE);
558:             if (err != ESP_OK)
559:             {
560:                 ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to erase sector %u at offset %u: %s", current_sector, sector_start, esp_err_to_name(err));
561:                 return false;
562:             }
563: 
564:             current_sector++;
565:         }
566: 
567:         // 写入数据到分区
568:         esp_err_t err = esp_partition_write(partition_, total_written, buffer, ret);
569:         if (err != ESP_OK)
570:         {
571:             ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to write to assets partition at offset %u: %s", total_written, esp_err_to_name(err));
572:             return false;
573:         }
574: 
575:         total_written += ret;
576:         recent_written += ret;
577: 
578:         // 计算进度和速度
579:         if (esp_timer_get_time() - last_calc_time >= 1000000 || total_written == content_length || ret == 0)
580:         {
581:             size_t progress = total_written * 100 / content_length;
582:             size_t speed = recent_written; // 每秒的字节数
583:             ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Progress: %u%% (%u/%u), Speed: %u B/s, Sectors erased: %u",
584:                      progress, total_written, content_length, speed, current_sector);
585:             if (progress_callback)
586:             {
587:                 progress_callback(progress, speed);
588:             }
589:             last_calc_time = esp_timer_get_time();
590:             recent_written = 0; // 重置最近写入的字节数
591:         }
592:     }
593: 
594:     http->Close();
595: 
596:     if (total_written != content_length)
597:     {
598:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Downloaded size (%u) does not match expected size (%u)", total_written, content_length);
599:         return false;
600:     }
601: 
602:     ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Assets download completed, total written: %u bytes, total sectors erased: %u",
603:              total_written, current_sector);
604: 
605:     // 重新初始化资源分区
606:     if (!InitializePartition())
607:     {
608:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to re-initialize assets partition");
609:         return false;
610:     }
611: 
612:     return true;
613: }
614: 
615: bool Assets::GetAssetData(const std::string &name, void *&ptr, size_t &size)
616: {
617: }
618: 
</file>

qualitative.analysis:
Semantic Correctness (65/100): The generated code has significant semantic issues. While both functions aim to retrieve asset data, the ground truth includes critical validation logic that's missing in the generated code. The ground truth checks for a valid magic number ('ZZ') at the beginning of the asset data, which is essential for ensuring data integrity. Without this validation, the generated code could return invalid or corrupted data. Additionally, the ground truth properly handles the offset by skipping the first 2 bytes (magic number) when setting the pointer, while the generated code doesn't account for this. However, both functions follow the same basic pattern of looking up assets and returning data pointers.

Structure Similarity (85/100): The structural similarity is quite high. Both functions have identical signatures, use the same variable names (name, ptr, size), employ the same control flow with early returns, and use similar conditional logic patterns. The formatting and overall structure are very similar, with only minor differences in whitespace and brace placement. Both functions also use the same core API elements like map lookups and pointer arithmetic.

Functional Completeness (55/100): The generated code is incomplete in functionality. It lacks several critical features present in the ground truth: 1) Magic number validation ('ZZ' check), 2) Proper handling of the 2-byte header offset, 3) Error logging when validation fails, and 4) The explicit cast from mmap_root_ to char* and back. These omissions make the generated code potentially unsafe and less robust than the ground truth implementation.

31: bool DeviceStateMachine::IsValidTransition(DeviceState from, DeviceState to) const
32: {
33:     // Allow transition to the same state (no-op)
34:     if (from == to)
35:     {
36:         return true;
37:     }
38: 
39:     // Define valid state transitions based on the state diagram
40:     switch (from)
41:     {
42:     case kDeviceStateUnknown:
43:         // Can only go to starting
44:         return to == kDeviceStateStarting;
45: 
46:     case kDeviceStateStarting:
47:         // Can go to wifi configuring or activating
48:         return to == kDeviceStateWifiConfiguring ||
49:                to == kDeviceStateActivating;
50: 
51:     case kDeviceStateWifiConfiguring:
52:         // Can go to activating (after wifi connected) or audio testing
53:         return to == kDeviceStateActivating ||
54:                to == kDeviceStateAudioTesting;
55: 
56:     case kDeviceStateAudioTesting:
57:         // Can go back to wifi configuring
58:         return to == kDeviceStateWifiConfiguring;
59: 
60:     case kDeviceStateActivating:
61:         // Can go to upgrading, idle, or back to wifi configuring (on error)
62:         return to == kDeviceStateUpgrading ||
63:                to == kDeviceStateIdle ||
64:                to == kDeviceStateWifiConfiguring;
65: 
66:     case kDeviceStateUpgrading:
67:         // Can go to idle (upgrade failed) or activating
68:         return to == kDeviceStateIdle ||
69:                to == kDeviceStateActivating;
70: 
71:     case kDeviceStateIdle:
72:         // Can go to connecting, listening (manual mode), speaking, activating, upgrading, or wifi configuring
73:         return to == kDeviceStateConnecting ||
74:                to == kDeviceStateListening ||
75:                to == kDeviceStateSpeaking ||
76:                to == kDeviceStateActivating ||
77:                to == kDeviceStateUpgrading ||
78:                to == kDeviceStateWifiConfiguring;
79: 
80:     case kDeviceStateConnecting:
81:         // Can go to idle (failed) or listening (success)
82:         return to == kDeviceStateIdle ||
83:                to == kDeviceStateListening;
84: 
85:     case kDeviceStateListening:
86:         // Can go to speaking or idle
87:         return to == kDeviceStateSpeaking ||
88:                to == kDeviceStateIdle;
89: 
90:     case kDeviceStateSpeaking:
91:         // Can go to listening or idle
92:         return to == kDeviceStateListening ||
93:                to == kDeviceStateIdle;
94: 
95:     case kDeviceStateFatalError:
96:         // Cannot transition out of fatal error
97:         return false;
98: 
99:     default:
100:         return false;
101:     }
102: }

104: bool DeviceStateMachine::CanTransitionTo(DeviceState target) const
105: {
106:     return IsValidTransition(current_state_.load(), target);
107: }
108: 
109: bool DeviceStateMachine::TransitionTo(DeviceState new_state)
110: {
111:     DeviceState old_state = current_state_.load();
112: 
113:     // No-op if already in the target state
114:     if (old_state == new_state)
115:     {
116:         return true;
117:     }
118: 
119:     // Validate transition
120:     if (!IsValidTransition(old_state, new_state))
121:     {
122:         ESP_LOGW(TAG, "Invalid state transition: %s -> %s",
123:                  GetStateName(old_state), GetStateName(new_state));
124:         return false;
125:     }
126: 
127:     // Perform transition
128:     current_state_.store(new_state);
129:     ESP_LOGI(TAG, "State: %s -> %s",
130:              GetStateName(old_state), GetStateName(new_state));
131: 
132:     // Notify callback
133:     NotifyStateChange(old_state, new_state);
134:     return true;
135: }

36: bool DeviceStateMachine::IsValidTransition(DeviceState from, DeviceState to) const
37: {
38:     // Allow transition to the same state (no-op)
39:     if (from == to)
40:     {
41:         return true;
42:     }
43: 
44:     // Define valid state transitions based on the state diagram
45:     switch (from)
46:     {
47:     case kDeviceStateUnknown:
48:         // Can only go to starting
49:         return to == kDeviceStateStarting;
50: 
51:     case kDeviceStateStarting:
52:         // Can go to wifi configuring or activating
53:         return to == kDeviceStateWifiConfiguring ||
54:                to == kDeviceStateActivating;
55: 
56:     case kDeviceStateWifiConfiguring:
57:         // Can go to activating (after wifi connected) or audio testing
58:         return to == kDeviceStateActivating ||
59:                to == kDeviceStateAudioTesting;
60: 
61:     case kDeviceStateAudioTesting:
62:         // Can go back to wifi configuring
63:         return to == kDeviceStateWifiConfiguring;
64: 
65:     case kDeviceStateActivating:
66:         // Can go to upgrading, idle, or back to wifi configuring (on error)
67:         return to == kDeviceStateUpgrading ||
68:                to == kDeviceStateIdle ||
69:                to == kDeviceStateWifiConfiguring;
70: 
71:     case kDeviceStateUpgrading:
72:         // Can go to idle (upgrade failed) or activating
73:         return to == kDeviceStateIdle ||
74:                to == kDeviceStateActivating;
75: 
76:     case kDeviceStateIdle:
77:         // Can go to connecting, listening (manual mode), speaking, activating, upgrading, or wifi configuring
78:         return to == kDeviceStateConnecting ||
79:                to == kDeviceStateListening ||
80:                to == kDeviceStateSpeaking ||
81:                to == kDeviceStateActivating ||
82:                to == kDeviceStateUpgrading ||
83:                to == kDeviceStateWifiConfiguring;
84: 
85:     case kDeviceStateConnecting:
86:         // Can go to idle (failed) or listening (success)
87:         return to == kDeviceStateIdle ||
88:                to == kDeviceStateListening;
89: 
90:     case kDeviceStateListening:
91:         // Can go to speaking or idle
92:         return to == kDeviceStateSpeaking ||
93:                to == kDeviceStateIdle;
94: 
95:     case kDeviceStateSpeaking:
96:         // Can go to listening or idle
97:         return to == kDeviceStateListening ||
98:                to == kDeviceStateIdle;
99: 
100:     case kDeviceStateFatalError:
101:         // Cannot transition out of fatal error
102:         return false;
103: 
104:     default:
105:         return false;
106:     }

109: bool DeviceStateMachine::CanTransitionTo(DeviceState target) const
110: {

114: bool DeviceStateMachine::TransitionTo(DeviceState new_state)
115: {
116:     DeviceState old_state = current_state_.load();
117: 
118:     // No-op if already in the target state
119:     if (old_state == new_state)
120:     {
121:         return true;
122:     }
123: 
124:     // Validate transition
125:     if (!IsValidTransition(old_state, new_state))
126:     {
127:         ESP_LOGW(TAG, "Invalid state transition: %s -> %s",
128:                  GetStateName(old_state), GetStateName(new_state));
129:         return false;
130:     }
131: 
132:     // Perform transition
133:     current_state_.store(new_state);
134:     ESP_LOGI(TAG, "State: %s -> %s",
135:              GetStateName(old_state), GetStateName(new_state));
136: 
137:     // Notify callback
138:     NotifyStateChange(old_state, new_state);
139:     return true;
140: }

155:                        [listener_id](const auto &p)
156:                        { return p.first == listener_id; }),
157:         listeners_.end());

304: bool Ota::Upgrade(const std::string &firmware_url, std::function<void(int progress, size_t speed)> callback)
305: {

307:     esp_ota_handle_t update_handle = 0;

309:     if (update_partition == NULL)
310:     {
311:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to get update partition");
312:         return false;

315:     ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Writing to partition %s at offset 0x%lx", update_partition->label, update_partition->address);
316:     bool image_header_checked = false;
317:     std::string image_header;

319:     auto network = Board::GetInstance().GetNetwork();
320:     auto http = network->CreateHttp(0);

326:

328:     {

333:     size_t content_length = http->GetBodyLength();
334:     if (content_length == 0)
335:     {
336:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to get content length");
337:         return false;
338:     }
339: 
340:     char buffer[512];
341:     size_t total_read = 0, recent_read = 0;
342:     auto last_calc_time = esp_timer_get_time();
343:     while (true)
344:     {
345:         int ret = http->Read(buffer, sizeof(buffer));
346:         if (ret < 0)
347:         {
348:             ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to read HTTP data: %s", esp_err_to_name(ret));
349:             return false;
350:         }
351: 
352:         // Calculate speed and progress every second
353:         recent_read += ret;
354:         total_read += ret;
355:         if (esp_timer_get_time() - last_calc_time >= 1000000 || ret == 0)
356:         {
357:             size_t progress = total_read * 100 / content_length;
358:             ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Progress: %u%% (%u/%u), Speed: %uB/s", progress, total_read, content_length, recent_read);
359:             if (callback)
360:             {
361:                 callback(progress, recent_read);
362:             }
363:             last_calc_time = esp_timer_get_time();
364:             recent_read = 0;
365:         }
366: 
367:         if (ret == 0)
368:         {
369:             break;
370:         }
371:

383:                 if (esp_ota_begin(update_partition, OTA_WITH_SEQUENTIAL_WRITES, &update_handle))
384:                 {
385:                     esp_ota_abort(update_handle);
386:                     ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to begin OTA");
387:                     return false;
388:                 }

434: std::vector<int> Ota::ParseVersion(const std::string &version)
435: {
436:     std::vector<int> versionNumbers;
437:     std::stringstream ss(version);
438:     std::string segment;
439: 
440:     while (std::getline(ss, segment, '.'))
441:     {
442:         versionNumbers.push_back(std::stoi(segment));
443:     }
444: 
445:     return versionNumbers;
446: }

448: bool Ota::IsNewVersionAvailable(const std::string &currentVersion, const std::string &newVersion)
449: {
450:     std::vector<int> current = ParseVersion(currentVersion);
451:     std::vector<int> newer = ParseVersion(newVersion);
452: 
453:     for (size_t i = 0; i < std::min(current.size(), newer.size()); ++i)
454:     {
455:         if (newer[i] > current[i])
456:         {
457:             return true;
458:         }
459:         else if (newer[i] < current[i])
460:         {
461:             return false;
462:         }
463:     }
464: 
465:     return newer.size() > current.size();
466: }

468: std::string Ota::GetActivationPayload()
469: {
470:     if (!has_serial_number_)
471:     {
472:         return "{}";
473:     }
474: 
475:     std::string hmac_hex;
476: #ifdef SOC_HMAC_SUPPORTED
477:     uint8_t hmac_result[32]; // SHA-256 输出为32字节
478: 
479:     // 使用Key0计算HMAC
480:     esp_err_t ret = esp_hmac_calculate(HMAC_KEY0, (uint8_t *)activation_challenge_.data(), activation_challenge_.size(), hmac_result);
481:     if (ret != ESP_OK)
482:     {
483:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "HMAC calculation failed: %s", esp_err_to_name(ret));
484:         return "{}";
485:     }
486: 
487:     for (size_t i = 0; i < sizeof(hmac_result); i++)
488:     {
489:         char buffer[3];
490:         sprintf(buffer, "%02x", hmac_result[i]);
491:         hmac_hex += buffer;
492:     }
493: #endif
494: 
495:     cJSON *payload = cJSON_CreateObject();
496:     cJSON_AddStringToObject(payload, "algorithm", "hmac-sha256");
497:     cJSON_AddStringToObject(payload, "serial_number", serial_number_.c_str());
498:     cJSON_AddStringToObject(payload, "challenge", activation_challenge_.c_str());
499:     cJSON_AddStringToObject(payload, "hmac", hmac_hex.c_str());
500:     auto json_str = cJSON_PrintUnformatted(payload);
501:     std::string json(json_str);
502:     cJSON_free(json_str);
503:     cJSON_Delete(payload);
504: 
505:     ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Activation payload: %s", json.c_str());
506:     return json;
507: }
508: 
509: esp_err_t Ota::Activate()
510: {
511:     if (!has_activation_challenge_)
512:     {
513:         ESP_LOGW(TAG, "No activation challenge found");
514:         return ESP_FAIL;
515:     }
516: 
517:     std::string url = GetCheckVersionUrl();
518:     if (url.back() != '/')
519:     {
520:         url += "/activate";
521:     }
522:     else
523:     {
524:         url += "activate";
525:     }
526: 
527:     auto http = SetupHttp();
528: 
529:     std::string data = GetActivationPayload();
530:     http->SetContent(std::move(data));
531: 
532:     if (!http->Open("POST", url))
533:     {
534:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to open HTTP connection");
535:         return ESP_FAIL;
536:     }
537: 
538:     auto status_code = http->GetStatusCode();
539:     if (status_code == 202)
540:     {
541:         return ESP_ERR_TIMEOUT;
542:     }
543:     if (status_code != 200)
544:     {
545:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to activate, code: %d, body: %s", status_code, http->ReadAll().c_str());
546:         return ESP_FAIL;
547:     }
548: 
549:     ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Activation successful");
550:     return ESP_OK;
551: }

qualitative.analysis:
The generated code completely fails to meet the requirements compared to the ground truth:

1. **Semantic Correctness (0/100)**: The generated code has zero semantic correctness. The ground truth code implements OTA (Over-The-Air) initialization that reads a serial number from ESP32 efuse memory, while the generated code only initializes various boolean flags and timeout variables without any efuse reading or serial number handling. These are entirely different functionalities.

2. **Structure Similarity (20/100)**: Very low similarity. Both use the same constructor syntax (Ota::Ota()), but the generated code lacks any of the actual functionality. The structure appears to be a generic initialization routine rather than an OTA-specific constructor. The generated code uses standard C++ initialization while the ground truth uses ESP-IDF specific APIs.

3. **Functional Completeness (0/100)**: Complete failure. The ground truth code performs critical OTA initialization including efuse reading, error checking, and serial number validation. The generated code only sets default values for various member variables but does nothing related to OTA functionality or serial number retrieval. It's missing all core functionality including:
   - ESP32 efuse API calls
   - Serial number reading and processing
   - Error handling for efuse operations
   - Conditional logic based on read results
   - String conversion from binary data

Overall, this represents a fundamental misunderstanding of what the task requires - the generated code doesn't implement the OTA constructor at all, instead providing a generic member variable initializer.

389:         }

453: std::vector<int> Ota::ParseVersion(const std::string &version)

457:     std::string segment;

467: bool Ota::IsNewVersionAvailable(const std::string &currentVersion, const std::string &newVersion)
468: {
469:     std::vector<int> current = ParseVersion(currentVersion);
470:     std::vector<int> newer = ParseVersion(newVersion);
471: 
472:     for (size_t i = 0; i < std::min(current.size(), newer.size()); ++i)
473:     {
474:         if (newer[i] > current[i])
475:         {
476:             return true;
477:         }
478:         else if (newer[i] < current[i])
479:         {
480:             return false;
481:         }
482:     }
483: 
484:     return newer.size() > current.size();
485: }

238:                 ts += (timezone_offset->valueint * 60 * 1000); // 转换分钟为毫秒
239:             }
240: 
241:             tv.tv_sec = (time_t)(ts / 1000);                         // 转换毫秒为秒
242:             tv.tv_usec = (suseconds_t)((long long)ts % 1000) * 1000; // 剩余的毫秒转换为微秒
243:             settimeofday(&tv, NULL);
244:             has_server_time_ = true;
245:         }
246:     }
247:     else
248:     {
249:         ESP_LOGW(TAG, "No server_time section found!");
250:     }
251: 
252:     has_new_version_ = false;
253:     cJSON *firmware = cJSON_GetObjectItem(root, "firmware");
254:     if (cJSON_IsObject(firmware))
255:     {
256:         cJSON *version = cJSON_GetObjectItem(firmware, "version");
257:         if (cJSON_IsString(version))
258:         {
259:             firmware_version_ = version->valuestring;
260:         }
261:         cJSON *url = cJSON_GetObjectItem(firmware, "url");
262:         if (cJSON_IsString(url))
263:         {
264:             firmware_url_ = url->valuestring;
265:         }
266: 
267:         if (cJSON_IsString(version) && cJSON_IsString(url))
268:         {
269:             // Check if the version is newer, for example, 0.1.0 is newer than 0.0.1
270:             has_new_version_ = IsNewVersionAvailable(current_version_, firmware_version_);
271:             if (has_new_version_)
272:             {
273:                 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "New version available: %s", firmware_version_.c_str());
274:             }
275:             else
276:             {
277:                 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Current is the latest version");
278:             }
279:             // If the force flag is set to 1, the given version is forced to be installed
280:             cJSON *force = cJSON_GetObjectItem(firmware, "force");
281:             if (cJSON_IsNumber(force) && force->valueint == 1)

290:     }

293:     return ESP_OK;

300: bool Ota::Upgrade(const std::string &firmware_url, std::function<void(int progress, size_t speed)> callback)
301: {
302:     ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Upgrading firmware from %s", firmware_url.c_str());
303:     esp_ota_handle_t update_handle = 0;
304:     auto update_partition = esp_ota_get_next_update_partition(NULL);
305:     if (update_partition == NULL)
306:     {
307:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to get update partition");
308:         return false;
309:     }
310: 
311:     ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Writing to partition %s at offset 0x%lx", update_partition->label, update_partition->address);
312:     bool image_header_checked = false;
313:     std::string image_header;
314: 
315:     auto network = Board::GetInstance().GetNetwork();
316:     auto http = network->CreateHttp(0);
317:     if (!http->Open("GET", firmware_url))
318:     {
319:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to open HTTP connection");
320:         return false;
321:     }
322: 
323:     if (http->GetStatusCode() != 200)
324:     {
325:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to get firmware, status code: %d", http->GetStatusCode());
326:         return false;
327:     }
328: 
329:     size_t content_length = http->GetBodyLength();
330:     if (content_length == 0)
331:     {
332:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to get content length");
333:         return false;
334:     }
335: 
336:     char buffer[512];
337:     size_t total_read = 0, recent_read = 0;
338:     auto last_calc_time = esp_timer_get_time();
339:     while (true)
340:     {
341:         int ret = http->Read(buffer, sizeof(buffer));
342:         if (ret < 0)
343:         {
344:             ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to read HTTP data: %s", esp_err_to_name(ret));
345:             return false;
346:         }
347: 
348:         // Calculate speed and progress every second
349:         recent_read += ret;
350:         total_read += ret;
351:         if (esp_timer_get_time() - last_calc_time >= 1000000 || ret == 0)
352:         {
353:             size_t progress = total_read * 100 / content_length;
354:             ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Progress: %u%% (%u/%u), Speed: %uB/s", progress, total_read, content_length, recent_read);
355:             if (callback)
356:             {
357:                 callback(progress, recent_read);
358:             }
359:             last_calc_time = esp_timer_get_time();
360:             recent_read = 0;
361:         }
362: 
363:         if (ret == 0)
364:         {
365:             break;
366:         }
367: 
368:         if (!image_header_checked)
369:         {
370:             image_header.append(buffer, ret);
371:             if (image_header.size() >= sizeof(esp_image_header_t) + sizeof(esp_image_segment_header_t) + sizeof(esp_app_desc_t))
372:             {
373:                 esp_app_desc_t new_app_info;
374:                 memcpy(&new_app_info, image_header.data() + sizeof(esp_image_header_t) + sizeof(esp_image_segment_header_t), sizeof(esp_app_desc_t));
375: 
376:                 auto current_version = esp_app_get_description()->version;
377:                 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Current version: %s, New version: %s", current_version, new_app_info.version);
378: 
379:                 if (esp_ota_begin(update_partition, OTA_WITH_SEQUENTIAL_WRITES, &update_handle))
380:                 {
381:                     esp_ota_abort(update_handle);
382:                     ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to begin OTA");
383:                     return false;
384:                 }
385: 
386:                 image_header_checked = true;
387:                 std::string().swap(image_header);
388:             }
389:         }
390:         auto err = esp_ota_write(update_handle, buffer, ret);
391:         if (err != ESP_OK)
392:         {
393:             ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to write OTA data: %s", esp_err_to_name(err));
394:             esp_ota_abort(update_handle);
395:             return false;
396:         }
397:     }
398:     http->Close();
399: 
400:     esp_err_t err = esp_ota_end(update_handle);
401:     if (err != ESP_OK)
402:     {
403:         if (err == ESP_ERR_OTA_VALIDATE_FAILED)
404:         {
405:             ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Image validation failed, image is corrupted");
406:         }
407:         else
408:         {
409:             ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to end OTA: %s", esp_err_to_name(err));
410:         }
411:         return false;
412:     }
413: 
414:     err = esp_ota_set_boot_partition(update_partition);
415:     if (err != ESP_OK)
416:     {
417:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to set boot partition: %s", esp_err_to_name(err));
418:         return false;
419:     }
420: 
421:     ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Firmware upgrade successful");
422:     return true;
423: }

430: std::vector<int> Ota::ParseVersion(const std::string &version)
431: {
432:     std::vector<int> versionNumbers;
433:     std::stringstream ss(version);
434:     std::string segment;
435: 
436:     while (std::getline(ss, segment, '.'))
437:     {
438:         versionNumbers.push_back(std::stoi(segment));
439:     }
440: 
441:     return versionNumbers;

444: bool Ota::IsNewVersionAvailable(const std::string &currentVersion, const std::string &newVersion)
445: {
446:     std::vector<int> current = ParseVersion(currentVersion);
447:     std::vector<int> newer = ParseVersion(newVersion);
448: 
449:     for (size_t i = 0; i < std::min(current.size(), newer.size()); ++i)
450:     {
451:         if (newer[i] > current[i])
452:         {
453:             return true;
454:         }
455:         else if (newer[i] < current[i])
456:         {
457:             return false;
458:         }
459:     }
460: 
461:     return newer.size() > current.size();
462: }

464: std::string Ota::GetActivationPayload()
465: {
466:     if (!has_serial_number_)
467:     {
468:         return "{}";
469:     }
470: 
471:     std::string hmac_hex;
472: #ifdef SOC_HMAC_SUPPORTED
473:     uint8_t hmac_result[32]; // SHA-256 输出为32字节
474: 
475:     // 使用Key0计算HMAC
476:     esp_err_t ret = esp_hmac_calculate(HMAC_KEY0, (uint8_t *)activation_challenge_.data(), activation_challenge_.size(), hmac_result);
477:     if (ret != ESP_OK)
478:     {
479:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "HMAC calculation failed: %s", esp_err_to_name(ret));
480:         return "{}";
481:     }
482: 
483:     for (size_t i = 0; i < sizeof(hmac_result); i++)
484:     {
485:         char buffer[3];
486:         sprintf(buffer, "%02x", hmac_result[i]);
487:         hmac_hex += buffer;
488:     }
489: #endif
490: 
491:     cJSON *payload = cJSON_CreateObject();
492:     cJSON_AddStringToObject(payload, "algorithm", "hmac-sha256");
493:     cJSON_AddStringToObject(payload, "serial_number", serial_number_.c_str());
494:     cJSON_AddStringToObject(payload, "challenge", activation_challenge_.c_str());
495:     cJSON_AddStringToObject(payload, "hmac", hmac_hex.c_str());
496:     auto json_str = cJSON_PrintUnformatted(payload);
497:     std::string json(json_str);
498:     cJSON_free(json_str);
499:     cJSON_Delete(payload);
500: 
501:     ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Activation payload: %s", json.c_str());
502:     return json;
503: }

505: esp_err_t Ota::Activate()
506: {
507:     if (!has_activation_challenge_)
508:     {
509:         ESP_LOGW(TAG, "No activation challenge found");
510:         return ESP_FAIL;
511:     }
512: 
513:     std::string url = GetCheckVersionUrl();
514:     if (url.back() != '/')
515:     {
516:         url += "/activate";
517:     }
518:     else
519:     {
520:         url += "activate";
521:     }
522: 
523:     auto http = SetupHttp();
524: 
525:     std::string data = GetActivationPayload();
526:     http->SetContent(std::move(data));
527: 
528:     if (!http->Open("POST", url))
529:     {
530:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to open HTTP connection");
531:         return ESP_FAIL;
532:     }
533: 
534:     auto status_code = http->GetStatusCode();
535:     if (status_code == 202)
536:     {
537:         return ESP_ERR_TIMEOUT;
538:     }
539:     if (status_code != 200)
540:     {
541:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to activate, code: %d, body: %s", status_code, http->ReadAll().c_str());
542:         return ESP_FAIL;
543:     }
544: 
545:     ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Activation successful");
546:     return ESP_OK;
547: }

qualitative.analysis:
The generated code fails to correctly implement the intended functionality. While both codes aim to mark the current OTA version as valid, they use fundamentally different approaches that lead to different behaviors.

Semantic Correctness (65/100):
- The core logic is incorrect. The ground truth code checks if the partition is not "factory" and then marks the partition as valid using esp_ota_mark_app_valid_cancel_rollback() when in ESP_OTA_IMG_PENDING_VERIFY state.
- The generated code attempts to set the boot partition using esp_ota_set_boot_partition(), which is a completely different operation that doesn't achieve the same result.
- The generated code also lacks proper error handling for null partition pointer and doesn't check the partition state before marking it valid.

Structure Similarity (40/100):
- Function signature is identical but the implementation differs significantly.
- Control flow is different - the ground truth checks partition label and state, while the generated code simply sets the boot partition.
- API calls are completely different (esp_ota_mark_app_valid_cancel_rollback vs esp_ota_set_boot_partition).
- Error handling approach differs - ground truth has more specific error checking and logging.

Functional Completeness (50/100):
- The generated code only covers a small subset of what the ground truth does.
- Missing checks for factory partition to avoid unnecessary operations.
- Missing state verification (ESP_OTA_IMG_PENDING_VERIFY check).
- Missing detailed logging of the actual partition being processed.
- The core functionality of marking firmware as valid through proper OTA state management is not implemented.

343: bool Ota::IsNewVersionAvailable(const std::string &currentVersion, const std::string &newVersion)

qualitative.analysis:
Semantic Correctness (75/100):
The generated code implements the core OTA upgrade functionality but has several semantic issues. It uses a global variable 'update_handle_' instead of a local variable, lacks proper image header validation which is crucial for OTA safety, and doesn't properly handle the case where the firmware download fails mid-way. The logging messages are different and some error handling paths are missing compared to the ground truth. However, the overall logic flow for downloading and writing firmware is preserved.

Structure Similarity (65/100):
The structural similarity is moderate. Both functions have the same signature and follow a similar high-level flow, but there are significant differences in implementation details. The generated code uses a fixed buffer size of 4096 bytes instead of the dynamic 512-byte buffer, uses different API calls like 'SetupHttp()' instead of directly using Board::GetInstance().GetNetwork(), and introduces a global variable. The timing mechanism also differs slightly in implementation.

Functional Completeness (70/100):
The generated code covers most of the key functionalities but misses several important aspects. It lacks image header validation which is critical for checking firmware compatibility, doesn't implement the specific timing calculation for speed measurement (uses milliseconds vs microseconds), and doesn't handle the case where the firmware URL returns non-200 status codes. It also doesn't properly check the return value of esp_ota_get_next_update_partition() before proceeding with OTA operations.

321: {

323: 
324:     // Initialize OTA
325:     esp_err_t err = esp_ota_begin(esp_ota_get_next_update_partition(NULL), OTA_SIZE_UNKNOWN, &update_handle_);
326:     if (err != ESP_OK)
327:     {
328:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "esp_ota_begin failed: %s", esp_err_to_name(err));

341:         esp_ota_end(update_handle_);
342:         return false;
343:     }
344: 
345:     // Get content length for progress tracking
346:     size_t content_length = http->GetContentLength();
347:     ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Firmware size: %zu bytes", content_length);
348: 
349:     // Download and write firmware
350:     const size_t buffer_size = 4096;
351:     uint8_t *buffer = new uint8_t[buffer_size];
352:     size_t total_received = 0;

360:         if (bytes_read <= 0)

366:         err = esp_ota_write(update_handle_, buffer, bytes_read);
367:         if (err != ESP_OK)

370:             delete[] buffer;
371:             esp_ota_end(update_handle_);
372:             http->Close();
373:             return false;
374:         }
375:     }
376: 
377:     // Update progress
378:     int progress = content_length > 0 ? (total_received * 100 / content_length) : 0;
379:     if (callback)
380:     {
381:         callback(progress, speed);
382:     }
383: 
384:     // Log progress periodically
385:     if (progress % 10 == 0)
386:     {
387:         ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Downloaded: %zu/%zu bytes (%d%%)", total_received, content_length, progress);
388:     }
389: }
390: 
391: delete[] buffer;
392: http->Close();
393: 
394: // Finalize OTA
395: err = esp_ota_end(update_handle_);
396: if (err != ESP_OK)
397: {
398:     ESP_LOGE(TAG, "esp_ota_end failed: %s", esp_err_to_name(err));
399:     return false;

404: if (err != ESP_OK)

407:     return false;

321: {
322:     ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Upgrading firmware from %s", firmware_url.c_str());
323:     esp_ota_handle_t update_handle = 0;
324:     auto update_partition = esp_ota_get_next_update_partition(NULL);
325:     if (update_partition == NULL)
326:     {
327:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to get update partition");
328:         return false;
329:     }
330:

332:     bool image_header_checked = false;
333:     std::string image_header;

335:     auto network = Board::GetInstance().GetNetwork();
336:     auto http = network->CreateHttp(0);
337:     if (!http->Open("GET", firmware_url))

340:         return false;
341:     }
342: 
343:     if (http->GetStatusCode() != 200)

346:         return false;
347:     }
348: 
349:     size_t content_length = http->GetBodyLength();
350:     if (content_length == 0)
351:     {
352:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to get content length");
353:         return false;
354:     }
355: 
356:     char buffer[512];
357:     size_t total_read = 0, recent_read = 0;
358:     auto last_calc_time = esp_timer_get_time();
359:     while (true)
360:     {
361:         int ret = http->Read(buffer, sizeof(buffer));
362:         if (ret < 0)
363:         {
364:             ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to read HTTP data: %s", esp_err_to_name(ret));
365:             return false;
366:         }
367: 
368:         // Calculate speed and progress every second
369:         recent_read += ret;
370:         total_read += ret;
371:         if (esp_timer_get_time() - last_calc_time >= 1000000 || ret == 0)
372:         {
373:             size_t progress = total_read * 100 / content_length;
374:             ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Progress: %u%% (%u/%u), Speed: %uB/s", progress, total_read, content_length, recent_read);
375:             if (callback)
376:             {
377:                 callback(progress, recent_read);
378:             }
379:             last_calc_time = esp_timer_get_time();
380:             recent_read = 0;
381:         }
382: 
383:         if (ret == 0)
384:         {
385:             break;
386:         }
387: 
388:         if (!image_header_checked)
389:         {
390:             image_header.append(buffer, ret);
391:             if (image_header.size() >= sizeof(esp_image_header_t) + sizeof(esp_image_segment_header_t) + sizeof(esp_app_desc_t))
392:             {
393:                 esp_app_desc_t new_app_info;
394:                 memcpy(&new_app_info, image_header.data() + sizeof(esp_image_header_t) + sizeof(esp_image_segment_header_t), sizeof(esp_app_desc_t));
395: 
396:                 auto current_version = esp_app_get_description()->version;
397:                 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Current version: %s, New version: %s", current_version, new_app_info.version);
398: 
399:                 if (esp_ota_begin(update_partition, OTA_WITH_SEQUENTIAL_WRITES, &update_handle))
400:                 {
401:                     esp_ota_abort(update_handle);
402:                     ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to begin OTA");
403:                     return false;
404:                 }
405: 
406:                 image_header_checked = true;
407:                 std::string().swap(image_header);

410:         auto err = esp_ota_write(update_handle, buffer, ret);
411:         if (err != ESP_OK)
412:         {

414:             esp_ota_abort(update_handle);

430:         }

436:     {
437:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to set boot partition: %s", esp_err_to_name(err));
438:         return false;
439:     }
440: 
441:     ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Firmware upgrade successful");

499:     cJSON_AddStringToObject(payload, "hmac", hmac_hex.c_str());

80: /*
81:  * Specification: https://ccnphfhqs21z.feishu.cn/wiki/FjW6wZmisimNBBkov6OcmfvknVd
82:  */
83: esp_err_t Ota::CheckVersion()
84: {
85:     auto &board = Board::GetInstance();
86:     auto app_desc = esp_app_get_description();
87: 
88:     // Check if there is a new firmware version available
89:     current_version_ = app_desc->version;
90:     ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Current version: %s", current_version_.c_str());
91: 
92:     std::string url = GetCheckVersionUrl();
93:     if (url.length() < 10)
94:     {
95:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Check version URL is not properly set");
96:         return ESP_ERR_INVALID_ARG;
97:     }
98: 
99:     auto http = SetupHttp();
100: 
101:     std::string data = board.GetSystemInfoJson();
102:     std::string method = data.length() > 0 ? "POST" : "GET";
103:     http->SetContent(std::move(data));
104: 
105:     if (!http->Open(method, url))
106:     {
107:         int last_error = http->GetLastError();
108:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to open HTTP connection, code=0x%x", last_error);
109:         return last_error;
110:     }
111: 
112:     auto status_code = http->GetStatusCode();
113:     if (status_code != 200)
114:     {
115:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to check version, status code: %d", status_code);
116:         return status_code;
117:     }
118: 
119:     data = http->ReadAll();
120:     http->Close();
121: 
122:     // Response: { "firmware": { "version": "1.0.0", "url": "http://" } }
123:     // Parse the JSON response and check if the version is newer
124:     // If it is, set has_new_version_ to true and store the new version and URL
125: 
126:     cJSON *root = cJSON_Parse(data.c_str());
127:     if (root == NULL)
128:     {
129:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to parse JSON response");
130:         return ESP_ERR_INVALID_RESPONSE;
131:     }
132: 
133:     has_activation_code_ = false;
134:     has_activation_challenge_ = false;
135:     cJSON *activation = cJSON_GetObjectItem(root, "activation");
136:     if (cJSON_IsObject(activation))
137:     {
138:         cJSON *message = cJSON_GetObjectItem(activation, "message");
139:         if (cJSON_IsString(message))
140:         {
141:             activation_message_ = message->valuestring;
142:         }
143:         cJSON *code = cJSON_GetObjectItem(activation, "code");
144:         if (cJSON_IsString(code))
145:         {
146:             activation_code_ = code->valuestring;
147:             has_activation_code_ = true;
148:         }
149:         cJSON *challenge = cJSON_GetObjectItem(activation, "challenge");
150:         if (cJSON_IsString(challenge))
151:         {
152:             activation_challenge_ = challenge->valuestring;
153:             has_activation_challenge_ = true;
154:         }
155:         cJSON *timeout_ms = cJSON_GetObjectItem(activation, "timeout_ms");
156:         if (cJSON_IsNumber(timeout_ms))
157:         {
158:             activation_timeout_ms_ = timeout_ms->valueint;
159:         }
160:     }
161: 
162:     has_mqtt_config_ = false;
163:     cJSON *mqtt = cJSON_GetObjectItem(root, "mqtt");
164:     if (cJSON_IsObject(mqtt))
165:     {
166:         Settings settings("mqtt", true);
167:         cJSON *item = NULL;
168:         cJSON_ArrayForEach(item, mqtt)
169:         {
170:             if (cJSON_IsString(item))
171:             {
172:                 if (settings.GetString(item->string) != item->valuestring)
173:                 {
174:                     settings.SetString(item->string, item->valuestring);
175:                 }
176:             }
177:             else if (cJSON_IsNumber(item))
178:             {
179:                 if (settings.GetInt(item->string) != item->valueint)
180:                 {
181:                     settings.SetInt(item->string, item->valueint);
182:                 }
183:             }
184:         }
185:         has_mqtt_config_ = true;
186:     }
187:     else
188:     {
189:         ESP_LOGI(TAG, "No mqtt section found !");
190:     }
191: 
192:     has_websocket_config_ = false;
193:     cJSON *websocket = cJSON_GetObjectItem(root, "websocket");
194:     if (cJSON_IsObject(websocket))
195:     {
196:         Settings settings("websocket", true);
197:         cJSON *item = NULL;
198:         cJSON_ArrayForEach(item, websocket)
199:         {
200:             if (cJSON_IsString(item))
201:             {
202:                 if (settings.GetString(item->string) != item->valuestring)
203:                 {
204:                     settings.SetString(item->string, item->valuestring);
205:                 }
206:             }
207:             else if (cJSON_IsNumber(item))
208:             {
209:                 if (settings.GetInt(item->string) != item->valueint)
210:                 {
211:                     settings.SetInt(item->string, item->valueint);
212:                 }
213:             }
214:         }
215:         has_websocket_config_ = true;
216:     }
217:     else
218:     {
219:         ESP_LOGI(TAG, "No websocket section found!");
220:     }
221: 
222:     has_server_time_ = false;
223:     cJSON *server_time = cJSON_GetObjectItem(root, "server_time");
224:     if (cJSON_IsObject(server_time))
225:     {
226:         cJSON *timestamp = cJSON_GetObjectItem(server_time, "timestamp");
227:         cJSON *timezone_offset = cJSON_GetObjectItem(server_time, "timezone_offset");
228: 
229:         if (cJSON_IsNumber(timestamp))
230:         {
231:             // 设置系统时间
232:             struct timeval tv;
233:             double ts = timestamp->valuedouble;
234: 
235:             // 如果有时区偏移，计算本地时间
236:             if (cJSON_IsNumber(timezone_offset))
237:             {
238:                 ts += (timezone_offset->valueint * 60 * 1000); // 转换分钟为毫秒
239:             }
240: 
241:             tv.tv_sec = (time_t)(ts / 1000);                         // 转换毫秒为秒
242:             tv.tv_usec = (suseconds_t)((long long)ts % 1000) * 1000; // 剩余的毫秒转换为微秒
243:             settimeofday(&tv, NULL);
244:             has_server_time_ = true;
245:         }
246:     }
247:     else
248:     {
249:         ESP_LOGW(TAG, "No server_time section found!");
250:     }
251: 
252:     has_new_version_ = false;
253:     cJSON *firmware = cJSON_GetObjectItem(root, "firmware");
254:     if (cJSON_IsObject(firmware))
255:     {
256:         cJSON *version = cJSON_GetObjectItem(firmware, "version");
257:         if (cJSON_IsString(version))
258:         {
259:             firmware_version_ = version->valuestring;
260:         }
261:         cJSON *url = cJSON_GetObjectItem(firmware, "url");
262:         if (cJSON_IsString(url))
263:         {
264:             firmware_url_ = url->valuestring;
265:         }
266: 
267:         if (cJSON_IsString(version) && cJSON_IsString(url))
268:         {
269:             // Check if the version is newer, for example, 0.1.0 is newer than 0.0.1
270:             has_new_version_ = IsNewVersionAvailable(current_version_, firmware_version_);
271:             if (has_new_version_)
272:             {
273:                 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "New version available: %s", firmware_version_.c_str());
274:             }
275:             else
276:             {
277:                 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Current is the latest version");
278:             }
279:             // If the force flag is set to 1, the given version is forced to be installed
280:             cJSON *force = cJSON_GetObjectItem(firmware, "force");
281:             if (cJSON_IsNumber(force) && force->valueint == 1)
282:             {
283:                 has_new_version_ = true;
284:             }
285:         }
286:     }
287:     else
288:     {
289:         ESP_LOGW(TAG, "No firmware section found!");
290:     }
291: 
292:     cJSON_Delete(root);
293:     return ESP_OK;
294: }

296: void Ota::MarkCurrentVersionValid()
297: {
298:     auto partition = esp_ota_get_running_partition();
299:     if (strcmp(partition->label, "factory") == 0)
300:     {
301:         ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Running from factory partition, skipping");
302:         return;
303:     }
304: 
305:     ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Running partition: %s", partition->label);
306:     esp_ota_img_states_t state;
307:     if (esp_ota_get_state_partition(partition, &state) != ESP_OK)
308:     {
309:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to get state of partition");
310:         return;
311:     }
312: 
313:     if (state == ESP_OTA_IMG_PENDING_VERIFY)
314:     {
315:         ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Marking firmware as valid");
316:         esp_ota_mark_app_valid_cancel_rollback();
317:     }
318: }

320: bool Ota::Upgrade(const std::string &firmware_url, std::function<void(int progress, size_t speed)> callback)
321: {
322:     ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Upgrading firmware from %s", firmware_url.c_str());
323:     esp_ota_handle_t update_handle = 0;
324:     auto update_partition = esp_ota_get_next_update_partition(NULL);
325:     if (update_partition == NULL)
326:     {
327:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to get update partition");
328:         return false;
329:     }
330: 
331:     ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Writing to partition %s at offset 0x%lx", update_partition->label, update_partition->address);
332:     bool image_header_checked = false;
333:     std::string image_header;
334: 
335:     auto network = Board::GetInstance().GetNetwork();
336:     auto http = network->CreateHttp(0);
337:     if (!http->Open("GET", firmware_url))
338:     {
339:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to open HTTP connection");
340:         return false;
341:     }
342: 
343:     if (http->GetStatusCode() != 200)
344:     {
345:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to get firmware, status code: %d", http->GetStatusCode());
346:         return false;
347:     }
348: 
349:     size_t content_length = http->GetBodyLength();
350:     if (content_length == 0)
351:     {
352:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to get content length");
353:         return false;
354:     }
355: 
356:     char buffer[512];
357:     size_t total_read = 0, recent_read = 0;
358:     auto last_calc_time = esp_timer_get_time();
359:     while (true)
360:     {
361:         int ret = http->Read(buffer, sizeof(buffer));
362:         if (ret < 0)
363:         {
364:             ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to read HTTP data: %s", esp_err_to_name(ret));
365:             return false;
366:         }
367: 
368:         // Calculate speed and progress every second
369:         recent_read += ret;
370:         total_read += ret;
371:         if (esp_timer_get_time() - last_calc_time >= 1000000 || ret == 0)
372:         {
373:             size_t progress = total_read * 100 / content_length;
374:             ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Progress: %u%% (%u/%u), Speed: %uB/s", progress, total_read, content_length, recent_read);
375:             if (callback)
376:             {
377:                 callback(progress, recent_read);
378:             }
379:             last_calc_time = esp_timer_get_time();
380:             recent_read = 0;
381:         }
382: 
383:         if (ret == 0)
384:         {
385:             break;
386:         }
387: 
388:         if (!image_header_checked)
389:         {
390:             image_header.append(buffer, ret);
391:             if (image_header.size() >= sizeof(esp_image_header_t) + sizeof(esp_image_segment_header_t) + sizeof(esp_app_desc_t))
392:             {
393:                 esp_app_desc_t new_app_info;
394:                 memcpy(&new_app_info, image_header.data() + sizeof(esp_image_header_t) + sizeof(esp_image_segment_header_t), sizeof(esp_app_desc_t));
395: 
396:                 auto current_version = esp_app_get_description()->version;
397:                 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Current version: %s, New version: %s", current_version, new_app_info.version);
398: 
399:                 if (esp_ota_begin(update_partition, OTA_WITH_SEQUENTIAL_WRITES, &update_handle))
400:                 {
401:                     esp_ota_abort(update_handle);
402:                     ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to begin OTA");
403:                     ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to set boot partition: %s", esp_err_to_name(err));
404:                     return false;
405:                 }
406: 
407:                 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Firmware upgrade successful");
408:                 return true;
409:             }

416:             std::vector<int> Ota::ParseVersion(const std::string &version)
417:             {
418:                 std::vector<int> versionNumbers;
419:                 std::stringstream ss(version);
420:                 std::string segment;
421: 
422:                 while (std::getline(ss, segment, '.'))
423:                 {
424:                     versionNumbers.push_back(std::stoi(segment));
425:                 }
426: 
427:                 return versionNumbers;
428:             }
